recommended_adjustments: Add an explicit requirement that synthetic candidates must preserve uncertainty for unavailable remotes instead of inferring freshness.
Clarify that target suffix semantics should be checked from metadata only, without emitting host-local absolute paths.
Require follow-up routes to name the downstream workflow or owner-decision surface and state metadata-only handoff.

boundary_review.notes: The gate correctly protects public, _workmeta, and private-state separation; blocks host-local cloud roots, private/source payload copying, auto-repair, source download, NotebookLM operation, secret inspection, and false execution claims. The golden sample is public-safe synthetic and marks no real commands or mutations.

evaluator_review.claim_ceiling: May claim quality-gate sufficiency for public-safe synthetic latest-update follow-up packets only. Must not claim real workflow execution, repository freshness, skill synchronization, junction audit completion, repair, source availability, owner approval, or token/cost superiority without separate runtime evidence.
